name: strat-camera-focus-scan
desc: T07 DYNAMIC own-fleet cell scan (M1-1). Detour FUN_004c4170 prologue into a code cave that reads the player's home cell LIVE from their own fleet every world-enter, then writes it to *(source+0x320) when that field is 0. Truly scenario-robust (no hardcoded 2550). Verified RE chain: own char-id=*(mainState+0x3584a0); char array @mainState+0x36a8b4 stride 0x2d4 count(int)@+0x36a5dc -> match rec; flagship=*(rec+0x24); grid array @mainState+0x41a368 stride 0x58 count(u16)@+0x41a364 -> match gu; CELL=*(gu+0x08). Same downstream effect as strat-camera-focus (0x0b01 enabled + camera centers).
verified: BYTES ENCODED + capstone-verified (39 insns, 112 B, full consume, tail jmp 0x4c4175). Chain cross-checked in the decompile against FUN_004c2a80 (own-char walk: *piVar5==*(mainState+0x3584a0), piVar5[9]=flagship, grid walk piVar4 stride 0x16 dwords=0x58) and FUN_004c32a0 (iVar14=mainState+0x41a368+i*0x58; uVar12=*(iVar14+8) compared to *(mainState+0x126714) -> gu+0x08 IS the strategic cell). NOT BUILDABLE AS-IS: the cave body is 112 B but the only safe interior int3 cave (VA 0x5d5290) is 48 B (byte-measured; next int3 run is 15 B; the .text-END slack 0x66acd5 is a documented LIVE failure; the 0x4c7a53 0x00 run has an inbound ptr). needsSection: append an executable .text section (or find/clear a >=112 B safe hole) to host this cave, OR keep the 48 B-fitting strat-camera-focus immediate/cell-mem path. fitsCave=false -> the builder refuses this descriptor. needsLive: once hosted, drive to world, click home cell, observe 0x0b01 + camera center on the own-fleet cell across multiple scenarios.

patches.note: jmp cave (overwrites displaced mov al,[0x7ca554]) -- same detour as strat-camera-focus

patches.originalHex: PLACEHOLDER-needs-112B-cave: the safe int3 cave at 0x5d5290 is only 48B; this 112B scan body needs a larger host. Do NOT apply against 0x5d5290 (would overrun 64B of adjacent code).
patches.note: DYNAMIC scan cave body (112B): push eax/esi/edi/edx; edx=source; if src+0x320==0: scan char[0x36a8b4]/0x2d4 for own char-id, edi=flagship rec+0x24, scan grid[0x41a368]/0x58 for flagship, eax=cell gu+0x08, write [edx+0x320]; restore; displaced mov al; jmp 0x4c4175
